ModMetaData.name: RimSynapse NVIDIA Tool
ModMetaData.author: ArchDukeJim
ModMetaData.description:
RimSynapse NVIDIA Tool — GPU monitoring and performance dashboard for RimSynapse.
Shows real-time GPU stats (utilization, VRAM, temperature, power draw) alongside LLM request metrics. Designed for NVIDIA 4000 and 5000 series GPUs.
Features: - Real-time NVIDIA GPU monitoring via nvidia-smi - VRAM usage breakdown (total, LM Studio, RimWorld) - LLM request queue depth, throughput, and throttle status - Per-mod request stats and budget usage - Token usage tracking and capacity estimation - Context embedding diagnostics
Requires: Harmony, RimSynapse Core, NVIDIA GPU with driver installed
